name: Brooke's Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a mixing bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. In a small bowl, blend together the egg, milk, and oil. Beat until smooth.
4. Heat the griddle or pan over medium heat until it is hot enough that a drop of cold water sizzles when placed on it.
5. Add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture all at once. Use a whisk or rotary beater to blend until smooth.
6. Grease the griddle lightly if needed, then pour batter by the 1/4 cup onto each pancake.
7. Do not crowd the pancakes; turn them only once they have puffed up and are full of bubbles with a few breaking, and the underside is golden brown.
8. Serve immediately with butter and syrup.
Yield: 12 4-inch pancakes.
